{{Quote|The Mandalorians will rise again!|Xarga|<ref name="KOTORII" />}}
'''Xarga''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] drill instructor who served under the command of [[Canderous Ordo|Mandalore the Preserver]] during the time of the [[Mandalorian Wars]]. He wore [[Color/Legends|yellow]] [[Neo-Crusader armor]] reserved for Mandalorian high-ranking warriors. He gave [[Meetra Surik]] the task of finding and retrieving [[Kumus]]'s gear, presuming him [[Death/Legends|dead]] in the [[Jungle/Legends|jungle]], after having been gone for 3 [[Standard day/Legends|days]]. Surik returned with a living Kumus, who, unbeknownst to Xarga, had simply been stuck atop a possible cache-site rigged with explosives, with [[Boma]]s below, until Surik slew them. During the [[Sith assassin/Legends|Sith assassins]]' [[Skirmish on Dxun|attack]] on the [[Mandalorian Outpost (Dxun)|camp]], Xarga participated in, and survived, the battle, and apparently observed and commented upon Kumus' skill in battle. He assisted Surik's companions in defeating the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] on [[Dxun/Legends|Dxun]] during the [[Battle of Onderon (Onderon Civil War)|Second Battle of Onderon]].

==Behind the scenes==
Non-canonically, Surik can kill Kumus and return only with his gear, as instructed, without Xarga knowing Kumus had survived. Alternatively, they can tell Xarga why Kumus was alive, and that he had lost his ammunition and been surprised in such a "dishonorable" way.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'' {{1st}}
